name: Spinach-Radiccho Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine Radicchio, Spinach, Mushrooms, Red Pepper & Olives in individual salad bowls.
2. Cover and chill until serving time.
3. In a glass jar, combine Vinegar, Lemon Juice, Olive Oil & Pepper. Cover and shake vigorously.
4. Pour the mixture evenly over salads.
5. Sprinkle each salad with 1 tablespoon Parmesan Cheese before serving.
Fat 7.6. Chol. 1.
